gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and also, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; also, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; meanwhile, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, where event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; furthermore, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.
